message:
fix: correct GoReleaser cask caveats template (fixes #91)

The caveats block had unescaped double quotes and dollar signs that
broke Ruby syntax on every release. GoReleaser renders caveats as
double-quoted Ruby strings, where $ starts a global variable and
unescaped " terminates the string.

Fix the .goreleaser.yaml template to escape \" and \$ so the generated
cask is valid Ruby from the start. Also update the post-release patch
in release.yml to match the new caveats wording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,11 +136,13 @@ jobs:
 
           replacement = (
               f'{indent}caveats <<~EOS\n'
-              f'{inner}To enable shell integration, add to your shell rc file:\n'
+              f'{inner}To complete installation, add the following to your shell config:\n'
               f'\n'
-              f'{inner}  eval "$(ntm init zsh)"   # for zsh\n'
-              f'{inner}  eval "$(ntm init bash)"  # for bash\n'
-              f'{inner}  eval "$(ntm init fish)"  # for fish\n'
+              f'{inner}  # For zsh (add to ~/.zshrc):\n'
+              f'{inner}  eval "$(ntm init zsh)"\n'
+              f'\n'
+              f'{inner}  # For bash (add to ~/.bashrc):\n'
+              f'{inner}  eval "$(ntm init bash)"\n'
               f'\n'
               f'{inner}Run \'ntm tutorial\' to get started!\n'
               f'{indent}EOS'

@@ -186,11 +186,13 @@ homebrew_casks:
       zsh: ntm completion zsh
       fish: ntm completion fish
     caveats: |
-      To enable shell integration, add to your shell rc file:
+      To complete installation, add the following to your shell config:
 
-        eval "$(ntm init zsh)"   # for zsh
-        eval "$(ntm init bash)"  # for bash
-        eval "$(ntm init fish)"  # for fish
+        # For zsh (add to ~/.zshrc):
+        eval \"\$(ntm init zsh)\"
+
+        # For bash (add to ~/.bashrc):
+        eval \"\$(ntm init bash)\"
 
       Run 'ntm tutorial' to get started!
